name: Loadable

unions.name: Loadable
unions.comment: A representation of data-loading. This would usually go into your model.

aliases.name: FromGraphql
aliases.comment: data over GraphQL is a good use-case for loadables.

aliases.name: FromHttp
aliases.comment: data over Http is a good use-case for loadables.

values.name: expectUpdate
values.comment: Update your loadable to expect a new value. Use this when you expect a new value to arrive soon.
values.type: Loadable.Loadable error value -> Loadable.Loadable error value

values.name: hasError
values.comment: Has the loadable failed on the latest load or reload?

values.name: hasValue
values.comment: Is any value, stale or otherwise, contained within the loadable?

values.name: isLoading
values.comment: Is the loadable expecting a new value?

values.name: isStale
values.comment:
Does the loadable contain a stale value?
Staleness implies a reload is underway or failed, in which case the value from the most recent load is available.

values.name: map
values.comment: Transform the value of a loadable.
values.type: (value -> otherValue) -> Loadable.Loadable error value -> Loadable.Loadable error otherValue

values.name: mapError
values.comment: Transform the error of a loadable.
values.type: (error -> otherError) -> Loadable.Loadable error value -> Loadable.Loadable otherError value

values.name: toError
values.comment: Extract the error of a loadable, should there be one.

values.name: toValue
values.comment: Extract the value of a loadable, should there be one.

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the loadable with a result. Use this when a new value arrives, and your loadable is expecting the update.
values.type: Result.Result error value -> Loadable.Loadable error value -> Loadable.Loadable error value
